title: Letter to Morse code translation
description: This resource pack replaces the Latin letters with Morse code.
body:
This resource pack replaces the Latin letters with Morse code. Sometimes between 2 words is a "/".
# fully available for:
- (comming soon)

# In development / partially available:
- German

# will come with the following updates:
- English
- Italian
- Spanish
- Swiss German
- Dutch

# Important:
If you want to use the texture pack for your modpacks, feel free to do so, but please write the following in the description below: 
**Important: _Contains the resource pack "Letter to Morse code translation" by [GuSchu Gaming](https://modrinth.com/user/GuSchu_Gaming), licensed under CC BY 4.0._**

## used tools:
- [Google Gemini](https://gemini.google.com/)
- [Morse Code Translator](https://morsecode.world/international/translator.html)
